channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This CEO sells low-cost drugs, and he says Big Pharma might not be the true adversary
item.description: For many Americans, pharmaceutical drugs are too expensive—and thanks to a system of complex and tedious bureaucracy, any effort for meaningful reform has been futile. Cost Plus Drugs wants to change that.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: Amazon Sued by D.C. Over Alleged Delivery Discrimination in Predominantly Black Neighborhoods
item.description: Amazon sued by D.C. over allegations of delivery discrimination in predominantly black neighborhoods, affecting thousands of Prime members.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Malicious Play Store apps put 8 million Android users at risk
item.description: It's easy to download malicious apps if you're not careful, and a new report reveals more than a dozen malicious apps with SpyLoan malware have been available at the Play Store.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China declares US chips unsafe, urges companies to use domestic semiconductors
item.description: China has warned organizations against the use of US chips, as well as banning mineral exports used in US military applications.
item.dc:creator: benedict.collins@futurenet.com (Benedict Collins), TechRadar

item.title: How to bulk delete spam and old text messages on iPhone
item.description: Tech wizard Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to delete old unwanted texts and spam messages from cluttered inboxes of an iPhone in bulk.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 20 handy hidden tricks for Google Calendar on Android
item.description: Google Calendar is a core part of the Android productivity package — but if all you’re using is what you see on the app’s surface, you’re missing out on some pretty powerful possibilities. Yes, oh yes: Just like so many of our modern digital tools, there’s more to Google Calendar than meets the eye.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 4 ways to build a team equipped with emerging skills
item.description: We’ve all heard about how difficult the job market is on the applicant side, with candidates getting very little response from prospective employers. But the hiring side isn’t much easier.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: JPMorgan Chase builds ambitious AI foundation on AWS
item.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has deployed an internal AI assistant dubbed LLM Suite to more than 200,000 employees and is generating genuine value from its early AI investments.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The UAE’s digital transformation: A visionary leap into the future
item.description: As the United Arab Emirates celebrates its 53rd National Day, it reflects on an extraordinary journey of transformation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cython tutorial: How to speed up Python
item.description: Python is a powerful programming language that is easy to learn and easy to work with, but it is not always the fastest to run—especially when you’re dealing with math or statistics.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Just say no to JavaScript
item.description: The JavaScript programming language has a lot of history, but it was created over about — yes — a week in 1995. It was first called LiveScript, but the name was changed to JavaScript to ride the bandwagon for Java, despite having nothing to do with Java.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Amazon announces a set of Nova AI models
item.description: Amazon’s cloud computing division, Amazon Web Services (AWS), announced a new family of foundation models called Nova to power generative AI applications at its re:Invent 2024 conference on Tuesday. Amazon is rolling out four Nova models in total: Micro, Lite, Pro, and Premier.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Donald Trump is reportedly set to pick the crypto enthusiast Paul Atkins to lead the SEC
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has tapped Paul Atkins to chair the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), according to crypto outlet Unchained. Assuming Atkins accepts the offer, crypto enthusiasts would have plenty of reason to rejoice.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Murder trial of tech consultant in stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee to go to jurors
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Closing arguments in the high-profile murder trial of a tech consultant charged in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee concluded Tuesday, with both sides urging jurors to use their common sense to deliver justice.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Founder of failed crypto lending platform Celsius Network pleads guilty to fraud charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The founder and former CEO of the failed cryptocurrency lending platform Celsius Network could face decades in prison after pleading guilty Tuesday to federal fraud charges, admitting that he misled customers about the business.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Global warming fills New England's rich waters with death traps for endangered sea turtles
item.description: As global warming fills the plankton-rich waters of New England with death traps for sea turtles, the number of stranded reptiles has multiplied over the last 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Rodrique Ngowi And Patrick Whittle, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Judge reaffirms ruling invalidating massive Tesla pay package for Musk
item.description: A Delaware judge again blocked Elon Musk’s multibillion-dollar pay package from Tesla on Monday. The controversial compensation agreement, which is now worth more than $100 billion, was reapproved by Tesla shareholders in June.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill
